context: Tests whether the AppMigrationKit setup guidance is applied for an Android-to-iOS document migration brief.

checklist.name: System orchestration
checklist.description: States that the migration is system-orchestrated through an app extension and that the app does not manage the device-to-device session itself.

checklist.name: Extension entry
checklist.description: Uses an AppMigrationKit app extension entry point rather than placing migration work in ordinary app launch code.

checklist.name: Import protocol
checklist.description: Uses the resource import protocol for the Android-to-iOS destination path.

checklist.name: Export protocol
checklist.description: Names the resource export protocol choices for an optional iOS-to-other-platform export path.

checklist.name: Entitlement key
checklist.description: Names the App Migration data-container entitlement key.

checklist.name: Entitlement value
checklist.description: Shows or describes the entitlement value as a one-item string array containing only the containing app bundle identifier.

checklist.name: Availability split
checklist.description: Separates core framework availability from data-container entitlement availability.

checklist.name: Container access
checklist.description: Accesses containing app files through the migration data container exposed to the extension.

checklist.name: Status check
checklist.description: Checks the migration import result from the containing app on first launch.

checklist.name: Status clearing
checklist.description: Clears the migration import status after the app handles it.
